title: ivesia baileyi subsp. setosa
intro: Ivesia baileyi subsp. setosa, also known as Bailey's ivesia or setose ivesia, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ivesia baileyi subsp. setosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
